message:
fix: update GPUI integration to modern Render trait and element system

Refactors the rendering layer from deprecated Canvas/View API to modern GPUI
Render trait with element-based composition. Simplifies WorldView to display
text-based statistics overlay while preserving thread-safe world access pattern.
This establishes a working foundation for incremental visual features.

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
GPUI API MODERNIZATION (crates/scriptbots-render/src/lib.rs)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Previous approach (deprecated Canvas API):
```rust
impl View for WorldView {
    fn render(&mut self, cx: &mut ViewContext<Self>) {
        canvas.clear(gpui::Color::BLACK);
        canvas.fill_circle(...);
        cx.draw(&canvas);
    }
}
```

New approach (modern Render trait):
```rust
impl Render for WorldView {
    fn render(&mut self, _window: &mut Window, _cx: &mut Context<Self>)
        -> impl IntoElement {
        div()
            .child(summary_text)
            .child("Rendering milestones will add live agent visuals...")
    }
}
```

Key API changes:

1. Trait: View → Render
   • View trait deprecated in newer GPUI versions
   • Render trait is the standard approach
   • Returns impl IntoElement (composable UI elements)

2. Context: ViewContext → Context<Self>
   • Simplified context type
   • Window parameter now explicit
   • Cleaner ownership model

3. Rendering: Canvas → Element composition
   • Canvas API removed/deprecated
   • Element system (div, child) is declarative
   • Similar to React/SwiftUI mental model

4. Window creation: Updated open_window API
   ```rust
   // Old (previous commit):
   cx.open_window(|cx| cx.new_view(|cx| WorldView::new(world.clone())));

   // New (this commit):
   app.open_window(WindowOptions::default(), move |_, cx| {
       cx.new(|_| WorldView { world: world.clone() })
   }).expect("failed to open GPUI window");
   ```

Changes:
• WindowOptions parameter for configuration
• Closure receives (Window, Context) tuple
• cx.new() replaces cx.new_view()
• Returns Result, requiring error handling
• Direct struct initialization instead of new() method

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
TEXT-BASED STATS OVERLAY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Summary extraction:
```rust
let summary_text = self
    .world
    .lock()
    .ok()
    .and_then(|world| world.history().last().cloned())
    .map(|s| {
        format!(
            "Tick {} | Agents {} | Births {} | Deaths {} | Avg Energy {:.2} | Avg Health {:.2}",
            s.tick.0, s.agent_count, s.births, s.deaths,
            s.average_energy, s.average_health,
        )
    })
    .unwrap_or_else(|| "No simulation data yet.".to_string());
```

Error handling chain:
1. lock().ok() - Convert Mutex poison error to Option
2. and_then() - Navigate to last history entry
3. .cloned() - Clone TickSummary (small struct)
4. map() - Format display string
5. unwrap_or_else() - Fallback message

Display format:
```
Tick 120 | Agents 16 | Births 0 | Deaths 0 | Avg Energy 0.98 | Avg Health 0.95
```

Shows all TickSummary fields in readable format.

Element composition:
```rust
div()
    .child(div().child(summary_text))
    .child(div().child("Rendering milestones will add..."))
```

Two-level structure:
• Outer div: Root container
• Child 1: Stats text
• Child 2: Placeholder message

Future expansion:
• Add more div layers for controls (play/pause, speed)
• Add data tables for agent details
• Add chart elements when GPUI charting available

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
REMOVED FEATURES (TEMPORARY)
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Canvas rendering removed:
```rust
// Removed:
canvas.clear(gpui::Color::BLACK);
for (idx, position) in agents.iter().enumerate() {
    let energy = health[idx].clamp(0.0, 2.0) / 2.0;
    let color = gpui::Color::rgba(energy, 1.0 - energy, 0.2, 1.0);
    canvas.fill_circle(position.x / width, position.y / height, 4.0, color);
}
cx.draw(&canvas);
```

Rationale:
• Canvas API deprecated/unavailable in modern GPUI
• Alternative: WebGPU-based rendering via wgpu
• Will be re-implemented in future milestone
• Text overlay sufficient for initial integration

Window title removed:
```rust
// Removed:
cx.set_title(&format!("ScriptBots — Tick {} — ...", ...));
```

Rationale:
• set_title() not available in new Context type
• Stats now displayed in window body (better visibility)
• Window title can be set via WindowOptions if needed

Benefits of simplification:
• Working GPUI integration (compiles and runs)
• Stats visible in UI (not just logs)
• Foundation for incremental visual additions
• Reduced maintenance burden (no deprecated APIs)

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
STRUCT VISIBILITY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Changed WorldView to private:
```rust
// Before:
pub struct WorldView { ... }

// After:
struct WorldView { ... }
```

Rationale:
• WorldView is internal implementation detail
• Public API is run_demo(Arc<Mutex<WorldState>>)
• Users don't need direct WorldView access
• Cleaner module interface

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
THREAD SAFETY PRESERVED
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Arc<Mutex<WorldState>> pattern maintained:
```rust
struct WorldView {
    world: Arc<Mutex<WorldState>>,
}
```

Access pattern in render():
```rust
self.world.lock().ok().and_then(|world| ...)
```

Benefits:
• Non-blocking failure: Poison errors converted to None
• Graceful degradation: Shows fallback message if lock fails
• No panics: UI remains responsive even if simulation crashes
• Future-proof: Ready for background simulation thread

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
TESTING & VALIDATION
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Compilation:
• cargo check - Passes with new GPUI APIs
• No deprecation warnings
• All type signatures compatible

Runtime:
• Application launches successfully
• Window opens with stats overlay
• Bootstrap summary displayed correctly
• No crashes or panics

Output example (console):
```
INFO scriptbots_app: Primed world and persisted initial summary tick=120 agents=16 births=0 deaths=0 avg_energy=0.98
INFO scriptbots_app: Launching GPUI shell with latest world snapshot tick=120 agents=16 births=0 deaths=0 avg_energy=0.98
INFO scriptbots_app: Starting ScriptBots simulation shell
```

Output example (GPUI window):
```
Tick 120 | Agents 16 | Births 0 | Deaths 0 | Avg Energy 0.98 | Avg Health 0.95

Rendering milestones will add live agent visuals and controls here.
```

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
FUTURE WORK
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Rendering milestones:
1. WebGPU agent visualization (wgpu compute shaders)
2. Interactive controls (play/pause, speed slider)
3. Camera controls (pan, zoom, reset)
4. Agent selection and inspector panel
5. Real-time performance graphs
6. Food grid overlay
7. Spatial index visualization (debug mode)

Element enhancements:
• Styled divs with colors and spacing
• Flexbox layouts for responsive design
• Button elements for controls
• Custom canvas elements via wgpu integration

Performance:
• Currently: Render every frame (potentially wasteful)
• Future: Render on demand / throttled updates
• Target: 60fps UI, configurable sim speed

═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
SUMMARY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

This commit updates the GPUI integration to use modern APIs while maintaining
functionality. The Canvas-based agent rendering is temporarily removed in favor
of a text stats overlay, establishing a working foundation for incremental
visual feature development. Thread-safe world access pattern preserved for
future concurrent simulation/rendering.

Changes:
• Updated View → Render trait
• Replaced Canvas API with element composition (div/child)
• Modernized window creation with WindowOptions
• Simplified to text-based stats display
• Made WorldView private (implementation detail)

Lines: +34/-42 (net -8, refactoring)
